title: StringDup Back
description: This plugin return the old string duper glitch!
body:
# StringDup Back

## Description:
This plugin brings back a forgotten classic glitch: string duplication using the **tripwire system**!

## How It Works:

- When a player tries to **break a tripwire string** with **shears**, it **does not break immediately**.
- Instead, the string's state is **toggled** between `armed` and `disarmed`.
- If the string is **disarmed**, it can now be **broken normally** by the player.
- When a **disarmed string is broken**, it **drops string** while **preserving the redstone logic**, effectively restoring the original duplication glitch.

![Disarmed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/200da1b5ca7892fbd4dd3fdbdee8ae4112c7fa13.png)

You have also the /stringtoggle command to toggle every string dupper (when disabled, string still dont break, they just don't drop) and /stringamount to set the amount of string dropped.
